prompt: Create a vertical cinematic fantasy fashion poster in an elegant historical East Asian aesthetic: a young woman, a graceful noblewoman with chestnut-brown hair in a low bun decorated with tiny floral hairpins, stands in side profile beside a shallow reflective stream under an old willow tree. Her face is intentionally covered by a soft square warm-toned blur, while the rest of the figure is sharp and detailed. She wears layered cream and beige embroidered hanfu robes with red floral patterns, long wide sleeves, a pleated skirt, and flowing rust-red ribbons, holding a large cream paper parasol painted with delicate red blossoms and exposed wooden ribs over her shoulder. The scene contains exactly one woman, one open parasol, one massive dark twisting willow trunk, many long golden hanging willow branches, clusters of pale white flowers around her feet, scattered rocks, and one calm stream at the bottom reflecting warm light. Use a warm late-autumn golden-hour palette, dreamy shallow depth of field, volumetric backlight, soft bokeh, highly detailed fabric embroidery, painterly realism mixed with luxury editorial photography, 9:16 poster composition, centered full-body figure slightly left of center. Add a vertical calligraphy title to the right of the woman reading 茵悼晽萱弥旁, with two tiny butterfly motifs near it, and below it add a small elegant serif subtitle reading INICE SOND MIOSE SURTAL AUTMON. At the very bottom, include several narrow centered lines of tiny decorative serif credit text, intentionally mostly unreadable, like an art-book poster footer. Maintain a serene, poetic, autumnal mood with intricate natural textures and no modern objects.
